recommendations.title: Two Worlds
recommendations.overview: A French tradesman travels in time and liberates an oppressed tribe in another world.

recommendations.title: Le Chef
recommendations.overview: A veteran chef faces off against his restaurant group's new CEO, who wants to the establishment to lose a star from its rating in order to bring in a younger chef who specializes in molecular gastronomy.

recommendations.title: The Cabinet of Dr. Caligari

recommendations.title: The Rabbi's Cat
recommendations.overview: The story of a rabbi and his talking cat, a sharp-tongued feline philosopher brimming with scathing humor and a less than pure love for the rabbi's teenage daughter.

recommendations.title: A Prophet

recommendations.title: Free Fall

recommendations.title: Happiness Is in the Field

recommendations.title: Realive
recommendations.overview: Marc, a successful, ambitious man, is diagnosed with terminal cancer, and is given a few months to live.  Unable to accept death, he decides to cryogenically freeze himself. The love of his life is devastated. Seventy years later, Marc becomes the fi

recommendations.title: The Greatest Game Ever Played
recommendations.overview: A biopic of 20-year-old Francis Ouimet who defeated his golfing idol and 1900 US Open Champion, Harry Vardon.
